scenario: Run a capped real Qwen3.6 27B target + z-lab DFlash drafter sequential text smoke through direct shared_bench.py after the phase-aware preflight accounting fix.

smoke_result.row_error_message: DFlash no-go: DFlash does not support ragged cache layers yet; TextModel does not implement rollback_speculative_cache. Next steps: switch to a plain KVCache sequential path with a rollback-capable target model and keep DFlash default-off until a real sequential smoke passes.
smoke_result.runner_exit_zero_meaning: Process exit 0 is NOT success. Per-row error confirms fail-closed runtime compatibility blocker; no assistant output was generated.

phase_1_preflight_passed.observation: The phase-aware post-load preflight accounting fix (m14-dflash-post-load-preflight-accounting) worked. The Qwen3.6 27B target loaded end-to-end without 'Insufficient free memory' or any other preflight blocker.
phase_1_preflight_passed.stderr_evidence: prompt_tokens=25 warmup -> 513 -> 4095 warmup, token=446, ThreadLocalStream(Device(gpu, 0), 4), mode=sequential, distributed=False

phase_2_reached_dflash_stream_generate.observation: The runner reached dflash_stream_generate inside create_generator's DFlash path. validate_dflash_runtime_compatibility then raised DFlashUnavailableError before any token emission.

phase_3_runtime_compatibility_blocked.observation: Two genuine runtime compatibility blockers, both raising inside validate_dflash_runtime_compatibility and confirmed by direct inspection of the loaded ModelKit:

blockers.name: ragged_arrays_cache_layers
blockers.message: DFlash does not support ragged cache layers yet
blockers.root_cause: The Qwen3.6 27B target, when loaded through ModelKit (sequential text), produces 64 prompt-cache layers: 16 KVCache + 48 ArraysCache. The 48 ArraysCache are GDN (Gated Delta Network) linear-attention state caches whose type name triggers the 'ragged cache layers' check inside validate_dflash_runtime_compatibility. ArraysCache was the original opaque-cache failure path (see performance-future-work.md 'RESOLVED 2026-06-24: warm-restore VLM image-understanding regression'), so the dflash boundary still treats it as ragged until DFlash draft/verify can prove it handles GDN state rollback.

blockers.name: missing_rollback_speculative_cache
blockers.root_cause: The patched Qwen3_5 TextModel (mlx_engine/model_kit/patches/qwen3_5.py) exposes the GDN target layer for DFlash capture but does not yet implement lm.rollback_speculative_cache(prompt_cache, gdn_states, accepted, block_size). dflash_runtime.py invokes that exact method after every partial DFlash rejection; without it, dflash_stream_generate raises DFlashUnavailableError before reaching the first emitted token.

expected_vs_actual_behavior.a_capped_real_qwen36_dflash_smoke_comple: PARTIAL — sequential text route used (mode=sequential, distributed=False, ThreadLocalStream); target loaded; runtime compatibility check then failed closed before any token emission.
expected_vs_actual_behavior.smoke_report_has_zero_row_errors_and_val: FAIL — per-row DFlashUnavailableError captured cleanly; output_preview is empty; no assistant output produced.
expected_vs_actual_behavior.evidence_proves_no_unsupported_fallback_: PASS — telemetry.sequential_text_only=true, uses_native_runtime=true, fallback_status=fallback_preflight (NOT fallback_unsupported_surface); no LM Studio, no cheetara adapter (3180/3181/3182), no standard autoregressive draft_model loading used.
expected_vs_actual_behavior.smoke_artifacts_and_observations_are_rec: PASS — this JSON + the shared-bench report path + stderr evidence are recorded for follow-up features.

verdict: FAIL-CLOSED — runtime compatibility blockers (ragged ArraysCache layers + missing TextModel.rollback_speculative_cache) prevent the capped real-model smoke from emitting any target-verified token. Resource gate and preflight both pass; the failure is in dflash_stream_generate, not in preflight. Returning to orchestrator with exact logs per the feature description; retrying heavier loads without first patching the runtime compatibility surface is out of scope.
outstanding_followups: Patch the Qwen3_5 TextModel (mlx_engine/model_kit/patches/qwen3_5.py) to implement rollback_speculative_cache(prompt_cache, gdn_states, accepted, block_size) so partial DFlash rejection can truncate GDN history without losing accepted-token state.

Extend validate_dflash_runtime_compatibility to either prove ArraysCache / GDN rollback is safe (and allow it through) or keep the ragged-cache blocker but document the Qwen3.6 27B GDN state as the supported next slice.

After both fixes land, rerun this same capped smoke command; the smoke report should then show error=null, output_preview containing the assistant answer (e.g. 'ok'), completion_tokens between 1 and 16, and the same telemetry block.

No text-only Qwen3.6 MLX checkpoint is present in /Volumes/StudioStackSSD4TB/Development/LLM/lmstudio/lmstudio-community; the only Qwen3.6 MLX snapshots are the multimodal Qwen3.6-27B-MLX-8bit and the MoE Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MLX-8bit (promotion-blocked). Until the runtime compatibility blockers above are fixed, the capped smoke cannot complete on the available target.
